text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to make this formal by<n>reintroducing myself. I am
Mejiro<n>Ardan, and I look forward to training<n>with you from
now on.
choice_data_list: Same. Let's do our best, Ardan.
Same. Let's do our best, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Indeed. Now, before we begin...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Could I ask you to accompany me<n>somewhere this
weekend?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Before I know it, the weekend rolls<n>around...

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
We've arrived, Miss Ardan. Enjoy<n>your day, but do be
careful... And<n>please, Trainer, do look after her for<n>us.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After riding in a car owned by the<n>Mejiro family, we find
ourselves at an<n>art museum.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, no need to be nervous, Trainer.<n>Thank you for
accompanying us,<n>Nanny. I promise we'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite Ardan's reassurance, I can't<n>seem to calm down. I
anxiously scan<n>my surroundings...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Only for my eyes to land on the poster<n>for the exhibition
we'll be going to.<n>The title of this exhibition is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I've been meaning to see this<n>exhibition for a while
now, but I<n>thought it would be nice to have you<n>
accompany me.
choice_data_list: What kind of exhibition is it?
What kind of exhibition is it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This show features a wide variety of<n>media—paintings,
sculptures,<n>photography, film, and even traditional<n>arts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: However, they all have one thing in<n>common.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
They are all works that were released<n>after their respective
creators died.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I head into the exhibition, fully<n>expecting to be blown away
by each<n>artist's final work—their swan songs.<n>However...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While there certainly are some<n>awe-inspiring pieces, there
are also<n>works that leave me confused—I<n>mention that it's
just like any other<n>art exhibition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, I suppose that is one way to look<n>at it.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Together, Ardan and I make our way<n>through the exhibition,
until we reach a<n>door leading out of the museum.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
There's one more artwork left.<n>Trainer, could we head to
the forest<n>behind the museum?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It seems that's where the final piece<n>is being displayed,
and, well... that's<n>the piece I wish to see the most.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I hope you don't mind this little<n>detour.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With that, we head into the forest.<n>Judging from the lack of
other<n>attendees on the path, it seems like<n>very few people
know this artwork is<n>part of the exhibition.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: But as we finally reach the spot...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ah... Here it is. This is what I wanted<n>to see.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: What we find is a single painting.
